testcase.name: loginTest

failure.message: Actual page URL is not the same as expected. expected [http://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure/broke] but found [http://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Actual page URL is not the same as expected. expected [http://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure/broke] but found [http://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure]
